ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment And Default Judgment,
Off Calendar Feb-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
DEFENDANT DIANA MOLINA's Motion To Vacate Judgment And Default Judgment is taken off calendar by the moving party. Case settled. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2012 Continued To Mar-12-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DIANA MOLINA's MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULT AND JUDGMENT is Granted. Plaintiff failed to provide courtesy copies of the opposition papers as required by San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and the court's tentative ruling in advance of the previously scheduled hearing of July 9, 2012. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-09-2012 Continued To Jul-18-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT DIANA MOLINA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.
Continued on the Court's own motion to July 18, 2012 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff shall provide courtesy copies of its opposition papers to Department 302 by 4pm July 11, 2012 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar May-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - DIANA MOLINA, TEL. NO. 218-4404, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - Notice was not given to the other party after the tentative ruling came out. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DIANA MOLINA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS Denied without prejudice to being refiled. The moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
